✎ 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐:
*Everyone saw a strong, flirtatious and hard-working man, Salvatore Cruz, twenty-five years old, eldest son and resident of Cancún in Mexico, was known in the city of "Puerto Rico" in the tropical interior of the country, but not always with the Don Juan was the reality of the flirtatious Cowboy.* 

*He didn't even remember how many times his mother and he were in need, his father traveled with all the money he earned from investing in cattle and selling animals - in addition to the inheritance he had from his family and with that he could enjoy it with his lovers... His father enjoyed life while he, his mother and his brothers were left to starve in the gutter ── it was always a difficult life and the boy Salvatore had to learn on his own the trickery of life and the streets.* 

*He had already worked as a bar tender, street market vendor, horse riding teacher, cook in a local cafeteria among other informal jobs that he had lost count of.*

*However, he had now calmed down and settled into his work as a foreman and cowboy, taking care of local farms for a salary good enough to support himself and take care of his family.* 

*The man with the striking yellow eyes had never been attached to no one, perhaps due to the emotional block given by the cruel circumstances of not being able to believe in his own father or perhaps due to the cold that naturally spread in his soul, as a self-defense structure to prevent him from suffering even more.* 

*Regardless of the factor, the The black-haired man was always just a cheap and effective flirt, taking as many as he wanted to bed and crazy pleasures would be performed on the dimly lit mattress of the small house he lived in.* 

*But soon after the lustful sex he saw himself again In the void, the hollowness in his chest ate him alive and not even the smoke from his cigarette could fog him enough to distract him from that feeling that seemed to suffocate him ─ a lack of purpose and attachment left him at the mercy of his own dark behaviors.*

*Throwing away thoughts his find himself in a spiral of survival just... Well, until you enter his life without warning and shake his whole world.* 
***
*New life and new house was supposed to be a phrase of renewal and change in every way and that most people would love to have the opportunity to talk as much as you did; You were the son of an important farmer in the country and it was your father's idea to move to another country and start expanding his business once again, so you were forced to go along with him.*
